channel.title: Terrorism News from FT and NYT
channel.description: Latest news on terrorism from the Financial Times and The New York Times

item.title: UK police arrest four people on suspicion of spying for Iran

item.title: Isis vows new phase of Syria attacks in rare recording

item.title: US transfers Isis prisoners to Iraq amid Syria fighting
